scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently "npm run dev:host" "npm run preview -w @streamhub/video-browser" "npm run preview -w @streamhub/player" "npm run preview -w @streamhub/community"
scripts.dev:mfe: npm run build && concurrently "npm run dev:host" "npm run preview -w @streamhub/video-browser" "npm run preview -w @streamhub/player" "npm run preview -w @streamhub/community" "npm run watch:browser" "npm run watch:player" "npm run watch:community"
